template:
defmodule Solution do
  @doc """
  Returns true if the binary pattern matches the binary value.
  Supports ? (any bit) and * (zero or more bits) wildcards.
  """
  def match?(pattern, value) do
    do_match([[SLOT graphemes_call]], String.graphemes(value), %{})
  end

  # Memoized recursive matching
  defp do_match(pattern, value, memo) do
    key = {pattern, value}
    
    case [[SLOT memo_get]] do
      nil ->
        result = match_impl(pattern, value, memo)
        {result, Map.put(memo, key, result)}
      cached ->
        {cached, memo}
    end
  end

  defp match_impl([], [], _memo), do: true
  defp match_impl([], _value, _memo), do: false
  defp match_impl(["*"], _value, _memo), do: true
  
  defp match_impl(["*", "*" | rest_pattern], value, memo) do
    # Collapse consecutive stars
    match_impl(["*" | rest_pattern], value, memo)
  end
  
  defp match_impl(["*" | rest_pattern], value, memo) do
    # Try matching * with 0 chars, 1 char, 2 chars, etc.
    try_star_match(rest_pattern, value, 0, memo)
  end
  
  defp match_impl(["?" | rest_pattern], [_bit | rest_value], memo) do
    {result, _memo} = do_match(rest_pattern, rest_value, memo)
    result
  end
  
  defp match_impl([bit | rest_pattern], [bit | rest_value], memo) when [[SLOT bit_guard]] do
    {result, _memo} = do_match(rest_pattern, rest_value, memo)
    result
  end
  
  defp match_impl(_pattern, _value, _memo), do: false

  defp try_star_match(rest_pattern, value, consumed, memo) do
    remaining_value = [[SLOT drop_call]]
    {result, new_memo} = do_match(rest_pattern, remaining_value, memo)
    
    if result do
      true
    else
      if consumed < length(value) do
        try_star_match(rest_pattern, value, consumed + 1, new_memo)
      else
        false
      end
    end
  end
end
prompt: Pick the grapheme split, the memo lookup, the bit guard, and the drop call.
